title: Best Selling Stations
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT StationName) AS stations, COALESCE(SUM(TotalSale), 0) AS total FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT StationName AS label, SUM(TotalSale) AS value FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY StationName ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} Cr earned across {stations} station(s) during the report period. Your top selling ports are the anchors of your trade network — where the margins were best and the cargo hold emptied profitably.
details.help: total drives the title. Table rows are stations ranked by revenue. inaraSearchBase could link to Inara station lookups.

tagLines: Sales venue performance data archived. Preferred trading ports identified by transaction volume.
Some stations pay better. You found them. The route is yours.
Behind every high-revenue dock is a price differential that someone else missed.
